@graph.name: Forensic Accounting in Andhra Pradesh | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Forensic Accounting in Andhra Pradesh. From ₹1,00,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. CFE-led forensic accounting, fraud investigation, due dilige. Contact +91 99

acceptedAnswer.text: Application of CFE investigation techniques to detect financial fraud, embezzlement, and misrepresentation. Combines accounting, auditing, and investigative skills.
PE/VC investors for due diligence, companies investigating employee fraud, boards handling whistleblower complaints, and litigants requiring expert witness.

mainEntity.name: What credentials does your forensic team have?

acceptedAnswer.text: Led by CA V. Viswanathan who holds CFE (Certified Fraud Examiner) from ACFE USA, in addition to FCA and ACS.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide forensic accounting services in Andhra Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Andhra Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Andhra Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Andhra Pradesh fall under ROC Hyderabad. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Andhra Pradesh-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Andhra Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Andhra Pradesh: 5% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
